name: medium chain triglycerides
description: Medium chain triglycerides serve as a lightweight, non-greasy fat that enhances mouthfeel and provides rapidly absorbed energy in food products.
raw_text: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Caprylic/​Capric Triglyceride What-it-does: emollient Official CosIng Information All Functions: masking, perfuming, skin conditioning Description: decanoic acid, ester with 1,2,3-propanetriol octanoate; glycerides, mixed decanoyl and octanoyl CAS #: 73398-61-5 / 65381-09-1 | EC #: 277-452-2 / 265-724-3 Details A super common emollient that makes your skin feel nice and smooth . It comes from coconut oil and glycerin, it’s light-textured, clear, odorless and non-greasy. It’s a nice ingredient that just feels good on the skin, is super well tolerated by every skin type and easy to formulate with. No wonder it’s popular.
